description: Turn Spotify into an ambient, audio-reactive backdrop. Leave it on for a living view of whatever's playing instead of staring at a static window — or make it your own full-on visualizer. Deeply customizable: sound-wave rings or a spectrum, a floating centerpiece, particles, fullscreen, and saveable presets.
